docs:
# Text Reveal
Word-by-word reveals that activate as content enters the viewport.
## Import
```tsx
import { TextReveal } from "@/components/ui/text-reveal";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<TextReveal text="This reveal animates word by word as it enters the viewport." delay={0} words={undefined} duration={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **text** (string) — default: `"This reveal animates word by word as it enters the viewport."`: Text
- **delay** (number) — default: `0`: Delay
- **words** (string): Words
- **duration** (number): Duration
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add text-reveal
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/text-reveal
```
